items.title: Piano
items.description:
Build a strong musical foundation through piano lessons that focus on technique, expression, and
musical understanding across all levels and styles. Students are also guided through Trinity
College London graded piano exams, supporting the development of a well-rounded musical
portfolio.

items.title: Voice
items.description:
Develop vocal technique, control, and confidence through personalized voice training tailored to
each student. Our program also offers preparation for Trinity College London vocal exams,
helping students showcase their progress and build a strong performance portfolio.

items.title: Guitar
items.description:
Explore acoustic and electric guitar through engaging lessons that cover technique, chords, and
diverse musical styles. Students have the opportunity to prepare for Trinity College London
guitar exams, enhancing their musical journey with recognized certifications.

items.title: Ukulele Lessons
items.description:
Our ukulele lessons are designed for students who want to build a strong musical
foundation in a fun, approachable, and engaging way. Students learn proper technique,
chords, rhythm, strumming patterns, music reading basics, and performance skills while
exploring a variety of songs and styles.

items.title: Violin and Viola
items.description:
Learn proper technique, tone production, and expressive playing in a structured and supportive
environment. Our violin program includes preparation for Trinity College London graded exams,
allowing students to build both skill and formal credentials.

items.title: Cello
items.description:
Discover the depth and richness of the cello while developing strong technical and musical
foundations. Students may also work toward Trinity College London cello exams, contributing to
a meaningful and recognized musical portfolio.

items.title: Drums
items.description:
Strengthen rhythm, coordination, and musicality through dynamic and engaging drum lessons.
We offer guidance for Trinity College London drum kit exams, helping students track their
progress and achieve formal recognition.

items.title: Group Classes
items.description:
Our group classes are designed for maximum of four students with specialized attention
to each student. These classes offer the option to learn together for groups of friends and
families whom also have the option to make their own group. These classes are available
for Guitar, Ukulele, Piano, Violin, and Early Music Education. If you are interested,
please contact us and we will do our best to accommodate your request.

items.title: Early Music Education
items.description:
Our early music education program welcomes young learners starting as early as 3.5 years old.
Through fun, interactive classes, students develop rhythm, listening, coordination, and a love for
music in a nurturing environment. As they grow, we guide them toward instrument-based
learning and, when ready, introduce structured pathways such as Trinity College London
programs.

items.title: Trinity College London Certification Program
items.description: Pera Music School is proud to be an official Trinity College London examination center, offering students access to one of the world’s most renowned and internationally recognized assessment systems. Our programs are thoughtfully designed to integrate exam preparation seamlessly into each student’s musical journey, allowing them to develop both artistic excellence and academic distinction. As an accredited center, we offer Trinity College London Music Grades and Diplomas, as well as Drama and Music Theory qualifications. These globally respected certifications provide students with a distinguished musical portfolio, supporting their long-term academic and artistic aspirations.
